tasks.label: build (Debug x64)
args: $pf = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('ProgramFiles(x86)'); $vw = Join-Path $pf 'Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe'; $msb = & $vw -latest -prerelease -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find 'MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe' | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $msb) { Write-Error 'Nie znaleziono MSBuild. Zainstaluj Visual Studio z obciazeniem Desktop development with C++.'; exit 1 }; & $msb '${workspaceFolder}\gkiw_nst_08_win.vcxproj' /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 /m /nologo /v:minimal

tasks.label: build (Release x64)
args: $pf = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('ProgramFiles(x86)'); $vw = Join-Path $pf 'Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe'; $msb = & $vw -latest -prerelease -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find 'MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe' | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $msb) { Write-Error 'Nie znaleziono MSBuild. Zainstaluj Visual Studio z obciazeniem Desktop development with C++.'; exit 1 }; & $msb '${workspaceFolder}\gkiw_nst_08_win.vcxproj' /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x64 /m /nologo /v:minimal
